title: Biting Of Beggars.
content:
Who, railing, drives the lazar from his door,
    Instead of alms, sets dogs upon the poor.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Biting Of Beggars."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
